crossRepoFindings.message: large monorepos produce ranked review-required nested AGENTS.md candidates; keep them advisory and require explicit path selection before any write mode.

file coverage now distinguishes eligible from intentionally skipped files, and some sampled large repos still show budget-limited eligible categories; improve deeper deterministic ranking for Kubernetes-scale scans.
